message:
refactor: extract magic numbers into named constants across codebase

Replace inline numeric/string literals with well-named const declarations
at module scope, each with doc comments explaining meaning:

- id.rs: NONCE_RETRIES_PER_LENGTH, FALLBACK_HASH_LENGTH,
  SAFETY_BREAK_THRESHOLD, HARD_STOP_LIMIT, ABBREVIATION_THRESHOLD, etc.
- resources.rs: HIGH_FAN_OUT_THRESHOLD, STALE_THRESHOLD_DAYS,
  DENSITY_VERY_HIGH/MODERATE, CHAIN_DEPTH_DEEP/MODERATE,
  BOTTLENECK_ISSUES_DISPLAY_LIMIT
- tools.rs: DEFAULT_LIST_LIMIT, MAX_LIST_LIMIT,
  RECENT_EVENTS_DISPLAY_LIMIT, TOP_LABELS_DISPLAY_LIMIT, etc.
- sync.rs: HASH_DISPLAY_TRUNCATION_LEN, reuse MISSING_IDS_PREVIEW_LIMIT
- config/mod.rs: MAX_REDIRECT_DEPTH, replace "br" with DEFAULT_ID_PREFIX
- schema.rs: SQLITE_CACHE_SIZE_KB with cross-ref to validation limits
- dep_tree.rs: DEFAULT_MAX_TREE_DEPTH
- main.rs: SYNC_LOCK_FILENAME
- cli/mod.rs: COMPLETION_TITLE_MAX_WIDTH
- list.rs: cross-reference comment for DEFAULT_LIST_LIMIT alignment

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
